title: Update fall market schedule
description: Swap in the fall market lineup and remove the summer stalls that ended in August.
author: yvesquinn

title: Add online catering inquiry form
description: Add a simple inquiry form capturing event date, headcount, and tourtiere count so I stop fielding everything through Instagram DMs.
author: yvesquinn

title: Compress hero photos for faster load
description: Market hero photos are around 4MB each and slow on mobile. Convert to WebP and target under 300KB.
author: yvesquinn

title: Set up weekly deploy pipeline
description: Automate the site deploy so menu and schedule updates publish without me running the build by hand.
author: mara-dev

title: Validate phone numbers in inquiry submissions
description: Some inquiries come in with unreachable numbers. Validate the phone field before accepting the submission.
author: yvesquinn

title: Add tourtiere size and quantity dropdown
description: Let people pick size (6-inch, 9-inch, family-size) and quantity instead of typing it free-form.
author: yvesquinn
